title: poa pratensis subsp. irrigata
intro: Poa pratensis subsp. irrigata, also known as tall meadow grass, is a subspecies of grass native to North America and Europe. It is a perennial grass that grows in moist to wet environments, often found in meadows and along streams. The medicinal properties of Poa pratensis subsp. irrigata include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system, and it can be prepared as an infusion or tincture for herbal use.
